# Check if OpenAI supports 768-dim output
from openai import OpenAI
import os

# Load key
key_file = ''/Users/rudy/GitHub/yrsn/keys/OPENAI_API_KEY.txt''
with open(key_file) as f:
    content = f.read().strip()
    if ''='' in content:
        content = content.split(''='', 1)[1].strip(''""'')
    os.environ[''OPENAI_API_KEY''] = content

client = OpenAI()
# text-embedding-3-small supports dimensions parameter
resp = client.embeddings.create(
    model=''text-embedding-3-small'',
    input=''test'',
    dimensions=768  # Request 768-dim output
)
print(''Embedding dim:'', len(resp.data[0].embedding))
